STRONG FIELD - 162 stocks in optimal SMA29 zone
Weights: 35% Momentum + 30% Potential + 35% Extension
VIX 27.8 (HIGH)  |  Best sectors: Telecom, Semis & Tech, LatAm, Energy scimode_vix_sector_v1_0

Methodology

Scimode exit_signal_test.py
Methodology (scimode-validated)

Combined Score = 35% Momentum + 30% Potential + 35% SMA29 Extension

Profit Factor = sum(winning trades) / sum(|losing trades|). PF > 1.0 = profitable edge, PF < 1.0 = losing. Captures both win rate and payoff asymmetry in one number.

SMA29 Extension = (Close - SMA29) / SMA29. PF from scimode_pf_validation (468 tickers, trending filter):

ZoneExtensionPFMedian 21d FwdScore
OPTIMAL0-10%1.48-1.50+0.90 to +1.11%90-95
GOOD10-15%1.52+1.24%75
FAIR15-20%1.67+1.01%55
CAUTION20-25%1.58+0.49%40
WARNING25-40%1.66-1.87*+1.46 to +2.33%20-25
DANGER40-60%1.44*-2.21%10
EXTREME60%+1.52*+2.38%0

* WARNING/DANGER/EXTREME PF inflated by lottery-tail winners. PF_median (typical trader): WARNING 0.64-1.47, DANGER 1.14, EXTREME 0.91. Small samples (n=84-357).

Momentum Score: From momentum_ranker_v1_18 composite (returns + ratios + SPY-relative days).

Potential Score: Inverted pullback health (deep pullback = high potential). Scimode validated: low-health stocks return +2.17% 21d vs high-health +1.22%. VIX-boosted: at VIX 30+, deep pullbacks return +13.6% 21d with 84% WR.

Ideal entry: High momentum + high potential (deep pullback in uptrend) + optimal SMA29 zone (0-10% extension, PF ~1.5). Potential is VIX-boosted: deeper pullbacks at elevated VIX have the strongest forward returns.

SMA10 Exit Alert (scimode PF validation, 468 tickers):

SMA10 detects overextension faster than SMA29. PF validates exit signals.

AlertSMA10 ExtPFMedian 21d Fwd
EXIT ALERT25%+1.11 (med: 0.90)-2.21%
EXIT WATCH15-25%1.59 (med: 1.07)+0.49%
ELEVATED10-15%1.51+0.60%

Per-Asset-Class Scoring (scimode task #145, 1,376 tickers):

Extension scores are adjusted by asset class from taxonomy pole assignments. Key differences from universal buckets:

ClassKey DifferenceScore Effect
MinerINVERTED: overextension is bullish (64% WR at 15-25%)+30 to +40 at 15%+
IndexDanger 3x worse (27% WR, -15% median at 25%+)-20 to -30 at 10%+
BondDanger starts at 10% not 25% (40% WR at 10-15%)-25 to -30 at 10%+
CommodityPoor win rate at all extensions (46-48% at 10%+)-10 to -20 at 10%+
SectorSlightly better than universal (56-62% at 10%+)+5 to +15 at 10%+
EquityUniversal buckets calibrated to equity (no change)None

Path Quality (scimode_path_quality_v1_0, 52K observations, OOS validated):

Predicts the journey, not just the destination. Based on extension + VIX + sector combination.

GradeMeaningTypical MAEP(good path)
SMOOTHLow drawdown, quick green> -2%> 42%
OKModerate drawdown, eventual green-2 to -4%30-42%
ROUGHSignificant pain before profit-4 to -8%20-30%
CHOPPYDeep drawdown, may never recover< -8%< 20%

Hover over the Path badge for exact MAE, time-to-green, and probabilities. Good path = MAE > -2% AND green within 5 days. Bad path = MAE < -5% OR never durably green.

Key insight: Use SMA29 for entry scoring (stable optimal zone), SMA10 for exit alerts (sharper overextension detection). PF confirms median return signals -- EXIT ALERT at 25%+ SMA10 has PF_median < 1.0 (losing bucket for typical trader).
